name: M1.5 动量与冲量
subject: math
curriculum_points: • carry out the process of completing the square for a quadratic polynomial ax2 + bx + c and use a completed square form
• find the discriminant of a quadratic polynomial ax2 + bx + c and use the discriminant
• solve quadratic equations, and quadratic inequalities, in one unknown
• solve by substitution a pair of simultaneous equations of which one is linear and one is quadratic

excerpts.text: • carry out the process of completing the square for a quadratic polynomial ax2 + bx + c and use a completed square form
• find the discriminant of a quadratic polynomial ax2 + bx + c and use the discriminant
• solve quadratic equations, and quadratic inequalities, in one unknown
• solve by substitution a pair of simultaneous equations of which one is linear and one is quadratic

interactive_resources.code_hint: Matter.js 碰撞模拟：两球碰撞观察动量守恒，可调质量/初速度，显示动量条形图
interactive_resources.description: Matter.js 动量守恒碰撞模拟

errors.description: 只记年代与名词，不能用史料与制度变迁解释历史进程。
把传说叙述与考古/文献证据混为一谈，未区分证据强度。

exercises.stem: 结合课标要求，说明「M1.5 动量与冲量」的核心内涵，并各举一条史料或史实依据。
exercises.answer: 应答扣课标要点：• carry out the process of completing the square for a quadratic polynomial ax2 + bx + c and use a completed square form…；并区分证据类型（文献/考古/制度等）。

exercises.stem: 用因果链解释：• find the discriminant of a quadratic polynomial ax2 + bx + c and use the discr… 对理解「M1.5 动量与冲量」为何重要？
exercises.answer: 需写出前因—制度/经济/思想变化—后果，避免只罗列年代。
